title: MemoryCartographerEnvelope
description: Canonical top-level output envelope produced by the memory_cartographer Python core. Every response — code scan, database scan, or both — is wrapped in this envelope. See docs/contracts/memory-cartographer-contract.md for the narrative specification.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the output schema produced by the Python core (e.g., '1.0.0'). MAJOR increment = breaking change; MINOR = additive; PATCH = non-structural fix.

diagnostics.description: Structured diagnostic entries (errors, warnings, informational notices). Always present; may be empty.

code_cartography.description: Code scanning output. Present only when a code scan was requested and at least partially completed. Absent (not null) when not requested.

database_cartography.description: Database scanning output. Present only when a database scan was requested and at least partially completed. Absent (not null) when not requested.

WorkspaceIdentity.title: WorkspaceIdentity
WorkspaceIdentity.description: Provenance descriptor for the workspace that was scanned.

path.description: Absolute path to the workspace root as seen by the Python core process.

name.description: Display name for the workspace. Derived from directory name when no explicit name is configured.

fingerprint.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hash of sorted scanned file paths paired with mtime_unix_ns values. Computed after scope filtering. Used for cache invalidation.

GenerationMetadata.title: GenerationMetadata
GenerationMetadata.description: Provenance and performance data for the scan that produced this envelope.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the scan started (e.g., '2026-03-04T11:00:00.000Z').

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the scan in milliseconds as measured by the Python core.

cartographer_version.description: Semver version string of the Python core (memory_cartographer) that produced this output.

partial.description: true if the result is a partial scan; false for a complete scan. When true, diagnostics will contain at least one entry explaining what was skipped.

request_id.description: Echoed from the runtime request envelope for correlation.

DiagnosticEntry.title: DiagnosticEntry
DiagnosticEntry.description: A single diagnostic entry. See normalization-rules.md for the complete taxonomy.

code.description: Machine-readable diagnostic code (e.g., 'FILE_READ_ERROR'). See normalization-rules.md for full taxonomy.

severity.description: Severity level: error = scan failure or hard constraint violation; warning = degraded coverage; info = informational.

path.description: Workspace-relative file or directory path associated with this diagnostic, when applicable.

CodeCartographySection.title: CodeCartographySection
CodeCartographySection.description: Code scanning output section. Refined by docs/contracts/sections/code-cartography.schema.json. This stub enables top-level envelope validation before the section schema is finalized.

DatabaseCartographySection.title: DatabaseCartographySection
DatabaseCartographySection.description: Database scanning output section. Refined by docs/contracts/sections/database-cartography.schema.json. This stub enables top-level envelope validation before the section schema is finalized.
